claim_status_justification: The submitted image (img_2) clearly shows the laptop corner and body, revealing a low-severity scratch on the corner consistent with cosmetic damage of the type described. While the claimant described a dent, the observed scratch on the same claimed part (corner) is a minor cosmetic defect that supports the overall claim. The prior history of confusing monitor or tablet damage with laptop damage was reviewed and does not contradict the evidence presented here.
